}

#include <ranges>
#include <rfl.hpp>
#include <rfl/json.hpp>

namespace batch_insert_products {

    conn.execute("DROP TABLE IF EXISTS Product;");
    conn.execute(

        "name VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL, "
        "price REAL NOT NULL, "
        "category VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL, "
        "stock INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0);");
    
    conn.begin_transaction();
    conn.insert(products.begin(), products.end());

  }
}

}  // namespace batch_insert_products

#include <optional>
#include <sqlgen.hpp>
#include <sqlgen/sqlite.hpp>
#include <vector>
#include <chrono>
#include <iomanip>
#include <sstream>

namespace query_active_users_posts {

struct User {
  sqlgen::PrimaryKey<int> user_id;
  std::string username;
};

struct Post {
  sqlgen::PrimaryKey<int> post_id;
  int user_id;
  sqlgen::DateTime created_at;
};

struct ActiveUser {
  static constexpr const char* tablename = "ActiveUserView";
  static constexpr bool is_view = true;
  sqlgen::PrimaryKey<int> user_id;
  std::string username;
};

std::vector<ActiveUser> query_active_users_posts() {
  auto conn = sqlgen::make_connection<sqlgen::SQLite>("test_db.sqlite");

  // Create User table
  conn->execute(User().schema());

  // Create Post table
  conn->execute(Post().schema());

  // Define date range
  const auto start_date = sqlgen::DateTime{2025, 12, 1};
  const auto end_date = sqlgen::DateTime{2025, 12, 31};

  // Build the query
  const auto query = conn->select_from<User, Post>(
      .join_on = Post::user_id == User::user_id,
      .where = [&](const auto& _post) {
        return _post.created_at >= start_date && _post.created_at <= end_date;
      },
      .fields = { User::user_id, User::username }
  )
      .distinct()
      .transform([](auto&& _it) -> std::vector<ActiveUser> {
        std::vector<ActiveUser> result;
        while (_it.next()) {
          ActiveUser au;
          au.user_id = _it.get<int>("user_id");
          au.username = _it.get<std::string>("username");
          result.emplace_back(std::move(au));
        }
        return result;
      });

  return query.value_or(std::vector<ActiveUser>());
}

}  // namespace query_active_users_posts

namespace query_course_enrollment_stats {

struct Course {
  sqlgen::PrimaryKey<int> course_id;
  std::string title;
};

struct Enrollment {
  sqlgen::PrimaryKey<int> enrollment_id;
  sqlgen::ForeignKey<int, Course, "course_id"> course_id;
  std::optional<float> grade;
};

struct CourseStats {
  std::string title;
  int student_count;
  std::optional<double> avg_grade;
};

std::vector<CourseStats> query_course_enrollment_stats() {
  using Conn = sqlgen::SQLiteConn;
  using Session = sqlgen::Session<Conn>;

  Session session("test_db.sqlite");

  // Create tables if they don't exist
  session.insert_or_write<Course>().value();
  session.insert_or_write<Enrollment>().value();

  // Execute the query
  const auto query = session.select_from<Course, Enrollment>(
      sqlgen::JoinType::left, &Course::course_id, &Enrollment::course_id)
      .select<Course>(Course::title)
      .select<Enrollment>(sqlgen::count(Enrollment::enrollment_id).as("student_count"))
      .select<Enrollment>(sqlgen::avg(Enrollment::grade).as("avg_grade"))
      .group_by<Course::course_id, Course::title>()
      .transform([](auto range) {
        std::vector<CourseStats> result;
        for (const auto& res : range) {
          CourseStats cs;
          cs.title = res.get<Course>().title();
          cs.student_count = res.get<int>("student_count");
          cs.avg_grade = res.get<std::optional<double>>("avg_grade");
          result.push_back(std::move(cs));
        }
        return result;
      });

  return query.value();
}

}  // namespace query_course_enrollment_stats
```</answer>

output.text:
<answer>```cpp
#include <optional>
#include <rfl.hpp>
#include <sqlgen.hpp>
#include <sqlgen/sqlite.hpp>
#include <string>
#include <vector>

#include "query_employee_hierarchy.hpp"

namespace query_employee_hierarchy {

struct Employee {
  sqlgen::PrimaryKey<int> emp_id;
  std::string name;
  std::optional<int> manager_id;
};

struct EmployeeManager {
  std::string employee;
  std::optional<std::string> manager;
};

std::vector<EmployeeManager> query_employee_hierarchy() {
  auto conn = sqlgen::sqlite::ConnectionPool::make("test_db.sqlite").value();

  const auto e1 = sqlgen::TableWrapper<Employee>("e1");
  const auto e2 = sqlgen::TableWrapper<Employee>("e2");

  const auto query = sqlgen::select(e1.col("name"), e2.col("name"))
      .from(e1)
      .left_join(e2, e1.col("manager_id") == e2.col("emp_id"))
      .exec(conn);

  std::vector<EmployeeManager> result;
  for (const auto& row : query) {
    EmployeeManager em;
    em.employee = row[0].get<std::string>();
    em.manager = row[1].transform([](const auto& str) -> std::optional<std::string> {
      return str;
    }));
    result.emplace_back(std::move(em));
  }

  return result;
}

}  // namespace query_employee_hierarchy
```</answer>

output.text:
<answer>```cpp
#include <optional>
#include <rfl.hpp>
#include <sqlgen.hpp>
#include <sqlgen/sqlite.hpp>
#include <string>
#include <vector>

#include "query_search_books_by_criteria.hpp"

namespace query_search_books_by_criteria {

std::vector<Book> query_search_books_by_criteria(const BookFilters& _filters) {
  const auto select_from = sqlgen::select_from<Book>();

  const auto make_title_condition = [](const std::string& _keyword) {
    return sqlgen::make_condition<Book>([kw = _keyword](const auto& _b) {
      return _b.title.str().find(kw) != std::string::npos;
    });
  };

  const auto make_min_year_condition = [](int _year) {
    return sqlgen::make_condition<Book>([y = _year](const auto& _b) {
      return _b.year >= y;
    });
  };

  const auto make_genre_condition = [](const std::string& _genre) {
    return sqlgen::make_condition<Book>([g = _genre](const auto& _b) {
      return _b.genre == g;
    });
  };

  const auto make_max_price_condition = [](double _price) {
    return sqlgen::make_condition<Book>([p = _price](const auto& _b) {
      return _b.price <= p;
    });
  };

  std::vector<sqlgen::Condition<Book>> conditions;

  if (_filters.title_keyword) {
    conditions.push_back(make_title_condition(*_filters.title_keyword));
  }

  if (_filters.min_year) {
    conditions.push_back(make_min_year_condition(*_filters.min_year));
  }

  if (_filters.genre) {
    conditions.push_back(make_genre_condition(*_filters.genre));
  }

  if (_filters.max_price) {
    conditions.push_back(make_max_price_condition(*_filters.max_price));
  }

  if (!conditions.empty()) {
    const auto combined_condition = std::accumulate(
        conditions.begin(), conditions.end(), sqlgen::make_condition<Book>(true),
        [](const auto& _acc, const auto& _cond) { return _acc && _cond; }));
    select_from.where(combined_condition);
  }

  const auto conn = sqlgen::sqlite::connect("test_db.sqlite");
  const auto res = select_from.execute(conn);

  std::vector<Book> books;
  for (const auto& row : res) {
    books.emplace_back(row.template get<Book>());
  }

  return books;
}

}  // namespace query_search_books_by_criteria
```</answer>

<answer>```cpp
#include <rfl.hpp>
#include <sqlgen.hpp>
#include <sqlgen/sqlite.hpp>
#include <stdexcept>

namespace schema_create_complex_table {

struct UserProfile {
  sqlgen::PrimaryKey<int, sqlgen::auto_incr> user_id;
  sqlgen::Unique<std::string> username;
  sqlgen::Unique<std::string> email;
  sqlgen::Check<int, [](int a) { return a >= 18; }> age;
  std::string bio;
  sqlgen::DateTime<sqlgen::CurrentTimestamp> created_at;
  bool is_verified;
};

bool create_complex_table() {
  try {
    auto conn = sqlgen::make_sqlite_connection("test_db.sqlite");
    conn->execute<UserProfile>(sqlgen::create_table_t);
    return true;
  } catch (const std::exception& e) {
    return false;
  }
}
}  // namespace schema_create_complex_table
```</answer>

<answer>```cpp
#include <rfl.hpp>
#include <rfl/json.hpp>
#include <sqlgen.hpp>
#include <sqlgen/sqlite.hpp>

namespace schema_create_trigger_audit_log {

struct Product {
  sqlgen::PrimaryKey<int> product_id;
  std::string name;
  double price;
  int stock;
};

struct AuditLog {
  sqlgen::PrimaryKey<int, sqlgen::auto_incr> log_id;
  std::string table_name;
  int record_id;
  std::string action;
  sqlgen::DateTime timestamp;
};

bool create_trigger_audit_log() {
  try {
    auto conn = sqlgen::sqlite::Connection::make("test_db.sqlite");
    const std::string trigger_sql = R"(
      CREATE TRIGGER IF NOT EXISTS audit_product_update
      AFTER UPDATE ON Product
      BEGIN
          INSERT INTO AuditLog (table_name, record_id, action, timestamp)
          VALUES ('Product', OLD.product_id, 'UPDATE', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
      END;
    )";
    conn->execute(trigger_sql);
    return true;
  } catch (const std::exception& e) {
    return false;
  }
}
}  // namespace schema_create_trigger_audit_log
```</answer>

namespace schema_migration_add_column {

bool migration_add_column() {

    const auto uri = "test_db.sqlite";
    const auto conn = sqlgen::sqlite::connect(uri);

    // Retrieve existing columns.
    const auto pragma_res = conn->execute("PRAGMA table_info(User);");
    std::unordered_set<std::string> columns;
    for (const auto& row : pragma_res) {
      columns.insert(std::string(row["name"]));
    }

    // Add new columns if they don't exist.
    if (!columns.count("phone_number")) {
      const auto sql = "ALTER TABLE User ADD COLUMN phone_number VARCHAR(20);";
      conn->execute(sql);
    }
    if (!columns.count("is_active")) {
      const auto sql = "ALTER TABLE User ADD COLUMN is_active INTEGER DEFAULT 1;";
      conn->execute(sql);
    }
    return true;
  } catch (const std::exception& e) {
    return false;
  }
}

}  // namespace schema_migration_add_column

        .value_or(std::vector<std::vector<std::optional<std::string>>>>();

#include <string>

namespace generate_sql_dry_run {

struct A {
  sqlgen::PrimaryKey<int> id;

  int a_id;

};

      .where(b.score > 10 && a.name.like("%x%"))
      .order_by(b.score.desc())

  return query;
}

}  // namespace generate_sql_dry_run

<answer>```cpp
#include <ranges>
#include <rfl.hpp>
#include <sstream>
#include <stdexcept>
#include <type_traits>

#include <sqlgen.hpp>
#include <sqlgen/internal/collect/vector.hpp>
#include <sqlgen/sqlite.hpp>
#include <vector>

#include "upsert_inventory_items.hpp"

namespace upsert_inventory_items {

struct Inventory {
  sqlgen::PrimaryKey<int> item_id;
  std::string name;
  int quantity;
};

bool upsert_inventory_items(const std::vector<Inventory>& _items) {
  try {
    const auto conn = sqlgen::sqlite::connect("test_db.sqlite");

    const auto upsert_res = conn->template upsert<Inventory>(
        _items.begin(), _items.end(), &Inventory::item_id,
        {&Inventory::name, &Inventory::quantity}, nullptr);

    if (!upsert_res) {
      return false;
    }

    std::vector<Inventory> retrieved;
    const auto select_res = conn->template read<Inventory>(retrieved);
    if (!select_res) {
      return false;
    }

    const auto input_map = rfl::apply(
        [](const auto&... _is) {
          std::unordered_map<int, const Inventory*> _map;
          for (const auto& _i : {_is...}) {
            _map[_i.item_id] = &_i;
          }
          return _map;
        },
        _items);

    for (const auto& _retrieved_item : retrieved) {
      const auto it = input_map.find(_retrieved_item.item_id);
      if (it != input_map.end()) {
        if (it->second->name != _retrieved_item.name ||
            it->second->quantity != _retrieved_item.quantity) {
          return false;
        }
        input_map.erase(it);
      }
    }

    return input_map.empty();
  } catch (const std::exception& e) {
    return false;
  }
}
}  // namespace upsert_inventory_items
```</answer>

from sqlgen import SQLiteConnector
from datetime import datetime

class User(sqlgen.Table):
    user_id = sqlgen.Column(sqlgen.Integer, primary_key=True)
    username = sqlgen.Column(sqlgen.String(50), nullable=False, unique=True)
    email = sqlgen.Column(sqlgen.String(100), nullable=False, unique=True)
    join_date = sqlgen.Column(sqlgen.DateTime, nullable=False)
    city = sqlgen.Column(sqlgen.String(50))

class Friendship(sqlgen.Table):
    user_id1 = sqlgen.Column(sqlgen.Integer, primary_key=True)
    user_id2 = sqlgen.Column(sqlgen.Integer, primary_key=True)
    friendship_date = sqlgen.Column(sqlgen.DateTime, nullable=False)

        SELECT 1 FROM Friendship f3

    )

import sqlgen
from datetime import datetime

class User(sqlgen.Table):
    user_id = sqlgen.Column(sqlgen.Integer, primary_key=True)
    username = sqlgen.Column(sqlgen.String(50), nullable=False, unique=True)
    email = sqlgen.Column(sqlgen.String(100), nullable=False, unique=True)
    join_date = sqlgen.Column(sqlgen.DateTime, nullable=False)
    city = sqlgen.Column(sqlgen.String(50))

class Friendship(sqlgen.Table):
    user_id1 = sqlgen.Column(sqlgen.Integer, primary_key=True)
    user_id2 = sqlgen.Column(sqlgen.Integer, primary_key=True)
    friendship_date = sqlgen.Column(sqlgen.DateTime, nullable=False)

def analyze_social_network():
    conn = sqlgen.connect("sqlite:///test_db.sqlite")
    User.create_table(conn)
    Friendship.create_table(conn)

    # Query 1: Mutual friends using self-join
    query1 = """
    SELECT u1.username, u2.username
    FROM User u1
    JOIN Friendship f1 ON u1.user_id = f1.user_id1
    JOIN Friendship f2 ON f1.user_id2 = f2.user_id1
    JOIN User u2 ON f2.user_id2 = u2.user_id
    WHERE u1.user_id < u2.user_id
    AND EXISTS (
        SELECT 1 FROM Friendship f3 
        WHERE f3.user_id1 = u1.user_id AND f3.user_id2 = u2.user_id
    )
    GROUP BY u1.user_id, u2.user_id
    HAVING COUNT(f1.user_id2) > 0;
    """
    mutual = conn.execute(query1).fetchall()

    # Query 3: Friend-of-friend relationships
    query3 = """
    SELECT u1.username, u2.username
    FROM User u1
    JOIN Friendship f1 ON u1.user_id = f1.user_id1
    JOIN Friendship f2 ON f1.user_id2 = f2.user_id1
    JOIN User u2 ON f2.user_id2 = u2.user_id
    WHERE u1.user_id < u2.user_id
    AND NOT EXISTS (
        SELECT 1 FROM Friendship f3 
        WHERE f3.user_id1 = u1.user_id AND f3.user_id2 = u2.user_id
    )
    GROUP BY u1.user_id, u2.user_id
    HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT f1.user_id2) = 1;
    """
    foaf = conn.execute(query3).fetchall()

    # Query 5: Same city, not friends
    query5 = """
    SELECT u1.username, u2.username
    FROM User u1
    JOIN User u2 ON u1.city = u2.city AND u1.user_id < u2.user_id
    WHERE NOT EXISTS (
        SELECT 1 FROM Friendship f WHERE (f.user_id1 = u1.user_id AND f.user_id2 = u2.user_id)
        OR (f.user_id1 = u2.user_id AND f.user_id2 = u1.user_id)
    )
    """
    recommendations = conn.execute(query5).fetchall()

    # Combine all results
    results = []
    for res in mutual + foaf + recommendations:
        results.append({'user1_name': res[0], 'user2_name': res[1]})

    return results

#include <sqlgen.hpp>
#include <sqlgen/sqlite.hpp>
#include <vector>

namespace mathematical_operations_analysis {

struct Product {
  sqlgen::PrimaryKey<int> product_id;
  std::string name;
  double price;
  int quantity;
  double discount_rate;
};

struct MathAnalysis {
  int product_id;
  std::string name;
  double abs_price;
  double ceil_price;
  double floor_price;
  double rounded_price;
  double exp_discount;
  double ln_price;
  double log2_quantity;
  double sin_discount;
  double cos_discount;
  double tan_discount;
  double sqrt_quantity;
};

std::vector<MathAnalysis> analyze_mathematical_operations() {
  // Connect to the database
  auto conn = sqlgen::sqlite::connect("test_db.sqlite");

  // Prepare the SQL query
  const auto query = R"(
    SELECT 
      product_id,
      name,
      ABS(price) as abs_price,
      CEIL(price) as ceil_price,
      FLOOR(price) as floor_price,
      ROUND(price, 2) as rounded_price,
      EXP(discount_rate/100) as exp_discount,
      LN(price) as ln_price,
      LOG2(quantity) as log2_quantity,
      SIN(discount_rate) as sin_discount,
      COS(discount_rate) as cos_discount,
      TAN(discount_rate) as tan_discount,
      SQRT(quantity) as sqrt_quantity
    FROM Product;
  )";

  // Execute the query and fetch results
  const auto res = conn->execute(query);

  // Map the results to MathAnalysis structs
  std::vector<MathAnalysis> analyses;
  for (const auto& row : res) {
    MathAnalysis analysis;
    analysis.product_id = row.get<int>("product_id");
    analysis.name = row.get<std::string>("name");
    analysis.abs_price = row.get<double>("abs_price");
    analysis.ceil_price = row.get<double>("ceil_price");
    analysis.floor_price = row.get<double>("floor_price");
    analysis.rounded_price = row.get<double>("rounded_price");
    analysis.exp_discount = row.get<double>("exp_discount");
    analysis.ln_price = row.get<double>("ln_price");
    analysis.log2_quantity = row.get<double>("log2_quantity");
    analysis.sin_discount = row.get<double>("sin_discount");
    analysis.cos_discount = row.get<double>("cos_discount");
    analysis.tan_discount = row.get<double>("tan_discount");
    analysis.sqrt_quantity = row.get<double>("sqrt_quantity");
    analyses.push_back(analysis);
  }

  return analyses;
}

}  // namespace mathematical_operations_analysis

#include <sqlgen.hpp>
#include <sqlgen/sqlite.hpp>

namespace mathematical_operations_analysis {

struct Product {
  sqlgen::PrimaryKey<int> product_id;
  std::string name;
  double price;
  int quantity;
  double discount_rate;
};

struct MathAnalysis {
  int product_id;
  std::string name;
  double abs_price;
  double ceil_price;
  double floor_price;
  double rounded_price;
  double exp_discount;
  double ln_price;
  double log2_quantity;
  double sin_discount;
  double cos_discount;
  double tan_discount;
  double sqrt_quantity;
};

std::vector<MathAnalysis> analyze_mathematical_operations() {
  auto conn = sqlgen::sqlite::connect("test_db.sqlite");

  const auto query = R"(
    SELECT 
      product_id,
      name,
      ABS(price) as abs_price,
      CEIL(price) as ceil_price,
      FLOOR(price) as floor_price,
      ROUND(price, 2) as rounded_price,
      EXP(discount_rate/100) as exp_discount,
      LN(price) as ln_price,
      LOG2(quantity) as log2_quantity,
      SIN(discount_rate) as sin_discount,
      COS(discount_rate) as cos_discount,
      TAN(discount_rate) as tan_discount,
      SQRT(quantity) as sqrt_quantity
    FROM Product;
  )";

  const auto res = conn->execute(query);

  std::vector<MathAnalysis> analyses;
  for (const auto& row : res) {
    MathAnalysis analysis;
    analysis.product_id = row.get<int>("product_id");
    analysis.name = row.get<std::string>("name");
    analysis.abs_price = row.get<double>("abs_price");
    analysis.ceil_price = row.get<double>("ceil_price");
    analysis.floor_price = row.get<double>("floor_price");
    analysis.rounded_price = row.get<double>("rounded_price");
    analysis.exp_discount = row.get<double>("exp_discount");
    analysis.ln_price = row.get<double>("ln_price");
    analysis.log2_quantity = row.get<double>("log2_quantity");
    analysis.sin_discount = row.get<double>("sin_discount");
    analysis.cos_discount = row.get<double>("cos_discount");
    analysis.tan_discount = row.get<double>("tan_discount");
    analysis.sqrt_quantity = row.get<double>("sqrt_quantity");
    analyses.push_back(analysis);
  }

  return analyses;
}

}  // namespace mathematical_operations_analysis

#include <sqlgen.hpp>

namespace trim_and_length_validation {

struct UserProfile {
  sqlgen::PrimaryKey<int> user_id;
  std::string name;
  std::string email;
};

struct ValidatedProfile {
  sqlgen::PrimaryKey<int> user_id;
  std::string trimmed_name;
  std::string trimmed_email;
  int name_length;

};

std::vector<ValidatedProfile> trim_and_length_validation() {
  auto conn = sqlgen::make_sqlite_connection("test_db.sqlite");

          "user_id",

          sqlgen::length(sqlgen::trim("email")).as("email_length")));

  std::vector<ValidatedProfile> result;
  conn->read(query, result);
  return result;
}

}  // namespace trim_and_length_validation

<answer>```cpp
#include <ranges>
#include <rfl.hpp>
#include <sstream>

#include <sqlgen.hpp>
#include <sqlgen/sqlite.hpp>
#include <vector>

#include "calculate_order_metrics.hpp"

namespace calculate_order_metrics {

std::vector<OrderMetrics> calculate_order_metrics_impl(
    const std::vector<OrderItem>& _items) {
  const auto conn = sqlgen::SQLite::connect(":memory:");

  // Create the OrderItem table.
  conn.execute("CREATE TABLE OrderItem (
      item_id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,
      order_id INTEGER NOT NULL,
      product_id INTEGER NOT NULL,
      unit_price REAL NOT NULL,
      quantity INTEGER NOT NULL,
      discount_rate REAL,
      tax_rate REAL
  );");

  // Insert all OrderItem records into the table.
  for (const auto& item : _items) {
    conn.insert(item);
  }

  // Execute the SQL query to calculate the metrics.
  const auto query = R"(
    SELECT 
      item_id,
      order_id,
      product_id,
      unit_price,
      quantity,
      COALESCE(discount_rate, 0) AS discount_rate,
      COALESCE(tax_rate, 0) AS tax_rate,
      (unit_price * quantity) AS gross_total,
      (unit_price * quantity * (1 - COALESCE(discount_rate, 0)/100)) AS discounted_total,
      (unit_price * quantity * (1 - COALESCE(discount_rate, 0)/100) * (1 + COALESCE(tax_rate, 0)/100)) AS final_total,
      (unit_price * quantity / quantity) AS unit_cost,
      (quantity % 10) AS quantity_group,
      (unit_price * 0.3) AS estimated_profit
    FROM OrderItem;
  )";

  const auto res = conn.execute(query);

  // Convert the result into a vector of OrderMetrics.
  std::vector<OrderMetrics> metrics;
  for (const auto& row : res) {
    OrderMetrics metric{
        .item_id = row["item_id"].as<int>(),
        .order_id = row["order_id"].as<int>(),
        .product_id = row["product_id"].as<int>(),
        .unit_price = row["unit_price"].as<double>(),
        .quantity = row["quantity"].as<int>(),
        .discount_rate = row["discount_rate"].as<double>(),
        .tax_rate = row["tax_rate"].as<double>(),
        .gross_total = row["gross_total"].as<double>(),
        .discounted_total = row["discounted_total"].as<double>(),
        .final_total = row["final_total"].as<double>(),
        .unit_cost = row["unit_cost"].as<double>(),
        .quantity_group = row["quantity_group"].as<int>(),
        .estimated_profit = row["estimated_profit"].as<double>()};
    metrics.push_back(std::move(metric));
  }

  return metrics;
}

}  // namespace calculate_order_metrics
```</answer>

<answer>
```cpp
#include <sqlgen.hpp>
#include <sqlgen/sqlite.hpp>

namespace read_single_record_by_id {

struct Customer {
  sqlgen::PrimaryKey<int> customer_id;
  std::string name;
  std::string email;
};

Customer read_single_record_by_id(int id) {
  auto conn = sqlgen::sqlite::make_connection("test_db.sqlite");
  return conn->get<Customer>(id);
}

}  // namespace read_single_record_by_id
```

output.text:
<answer>```cpp
#include <sqlgen.hpp>
#include <sqlgen/sqlite.hpp>
#include <vector>

namespace inventory_bulk_write_and_read {

struct Inventory {
  sqlgen::PrimaryKey<int> item_id;
  std::string name;
  int quantity;
  std::string location;
};

bool inventory_bulk_write_and_read(const std::vector<Inventory>& items) {
  auto conn = sqlgen::SQLite::connect("test_db.sqlite");

  // Begin transaction and bulk insert
  conn->begin_transaction();
  for (const auto& item : items) {
    conn->insert(item);
  }
  conn->commit();

  // Query with filter and order
  const auto& inv = Inventory::get_reflection();
  auto query = conn->select_from<Inventory>(
      inv.fields(inv.item_id, inv.name, inv.quantity, inv.location))
      .where(inv.quantity > 50)
      .order_by(inv.quantity.desc())
      .execute();

  return !query->empty();
}
}  // namespace inventory_bulk_write_and_read
```</answer>

<answer>```cpp
#include <rfl.hpp>
#include <sstream>
#include <stdexcept>
#include <vector>

#include "sqlgen.h"
#include "sqlgen/internal/collect/vector.h"
#include "sqlgen/internal/strings/strings.h"
#include "test_db.sqlite"

namespace column_is_null_checks {

struct Result {
  int profile_id;
  std::string display_name;
};

std::vector<Result> column_is_null_checks() {
  try {
    const auto conn = sqlgen::sqlite::connect("test_db.sqlite");

    const auto query = conn->select_from<Profile>("profile_id", "display_name")
        .where(sqlgen::col("bio").is_null() || sqlgen::col("avatar_url").is_null());

    const auto res = conn->execute(query)
        .transform([](auto&& _cursor) {
          return sqlgen::internal::collect::vector(_cursor | transform([](const auto& _row) {
            Result r;
            r.profile_id = _row.get<int>("profile_id");
            r.display_name = _row.get<std::string>("display_name");
            return r;
          }));
        }));

    if (!res) {
      throw std::runtime_error("Executing the query failed: " + res.error().what());
    }

    return res.value();
  } catch (const std::exception& e) {
    std::cerr << "An error occurred: " << e.what() << std::endl;
    return {};
  }
}

}  // namespace column_is_null_checks
```</answer>

<answer>```cpp
#include <sqlgen.hpp>
#include <sqlgen/sqlite.hpp>
#include <vector>

namespace update_set_operations {

struct Account {
  sqlgen::PrimaryKey<int> account_id;
  double balance;
  std::string status;
};

bool update_set_operations() {
  try {
    auto conn = sqlgen::SQLiteConnector::make_connection("test_db.sqlite");
    
    // Create Account table
    if (!conn->create_table<Account>()) {
      return false;
    }

    // Insert initial account
    Account initial_account{.balance = 100.0, .status = "active"};
    if (!conn->insert(initial_account)) {
      return false;
    }

    // Update balance and status
    Account updated_account = initial_account;
    updated_account.balance = 200.0;
    updated_account.status = "inactive";
    if (!conn->update(updated_account)) {
      return false;
    }

    // Verify update
    auto query = conn->select_from<Account>().where("account_id = 1").execute();
    if (query.size() != 1) {
      return false;
    }

    const auto& result = query[0];
    if (result.balance != 200.0 || result.status != "inactive") {
      return false;
    }

    return true;
  } catch (...) {
    return false;
  }
}
}  // namespace update_set_operations
```</answer>

<answer>```cpp
#include <ranges>
#include <rfl.hpp>
#include <sstream>

#include <sqlgen.hpp>
#include <sqlgen/sqlite.hpp>
#include <vector>
#include <optional>

#include "full_join_suppliers_products.hpp"

namespace full_join_suppliers_products {

struct Supplier {
  sqlgen::PrimaryKey<int> supplier_id;
  std::string name;
};

struct Product {
  sqlgen::PrimaryKey<int> product_id;
  int supplier_id;
  std::string name;
};

struct SupProd {
  std::string supplier_name;
  std::optional<std::string> product_name;
};

std::vector<SupProd> full_join_suppliers_products() {
  const auto conn = sqlgen::sqlite::connect("test_db.sqlite");

  const auto query = sqlgen::select_from<Supplier, Product>(
      sqlgen::JoinType::full_outer_join, "s", "p")
      .on(supplier_.supplier_id == product_.supplier_id)
      .columns(supplier_.name.as("supplier_name"), product_.name.as("product_name"));

  std::vector<std::pair<std::string, std::optional<std::string>>> results;
  conn->read_to(results, query);

  std::vector<SupProd> vec;
  for (const auto& [supplier_name, product_name] : results) {
    vec.emplace_back(SupProd{.supplier_name = supplier_name,
                             .product_name = product_name});
  }
  return vec;
}

}  // namespace full_join_suppliers_products
```</answer>

#include <sqlgen.hpp>

<answer>```cpp
#pragma once

#include <sqlgen.hpp>
#include <string>

namespace delete_with_complex_condition {

struct User {
  sqlgen::PrimaryKey<int> id;
  int age;
  std::string status;
};

/**
 * This function demonstrates deleting with complex conditions.
 * Returns: std::string.
 */
inline std::string delete_with_complex_condition() {
    auto query = sqlgen::delete_from<User>().where((User_.age < 18) | (User_.status == "inactive"));
    return query.to_sql();
}
}  // namespace delete_with_complex_condition
```</answer>

bool update_inventory_stock(const std::unordered_map<int, int>& received) {

  using namespace sqlgen::literals;

output.text:
<answer>```cpp
#include <sqlgen.hpp>
#include <sqlgen/sqlite.hpp>
#include <unordered_map>

namespace update_inventory_stock {

bool update_inventory_stock(const std::unordered_map<int, int>& received) {
  using namespace sqlgen;
  using namespace sqlgen::literals;
  auto conn_res = sqlite::connect("test_db.sqlite");
  if (!conn_res) return false;

  auto txn_res = begin_transaction(conn_res.value());
  if (!txn_res) return false;
  auto txn = txn_res.value();

  // Prepare the update statement once
  auto update_stmt = txn->prepare_statement(
      "UPDATE Product SET stock = stock + ? WHERE product_id = ?"
  );

  for (const auto& [pid, qty] : received) {
    auto exec_res = update_stmt->execute(qty, pid);
    if (!exec_res) {
      return false;
    }
  }

  auto commit_res = commit(txn);
  return commit_res.has_value();
}

}  // namespace update_inventory_stock
```</answer>

output.text:
<answer>```cpp
#include <sqlgen.hpp>
#include <sqlgen/sqlite.hpp>
#include <vector>

namespace create_view_order_summary {

struct Order {
  sqlgen::PrimaryKey<int> order_id;
  std::string customer;
};

struct OrderItem {
  sqlgen::PrimaryKey<int> item_id;
  int order_id;
  double unit_price;
  int quantity;
};

struct OrderSummary {
  static constexpr const char* tablename = "OrderSummaryView";
  static constexpr bool is_view = true;
  sqlgen::PrimaryKey<int> order_id;
  std::string customer;
  double total;
};

std::vector<OrderSummary> create_view_order_summary() {
    auto conn = sqlgen::sqlite::connect("test_db.sqlite");

    const std::string create_view_sql =
        "CREATE VIEW OrderSummaryView AS "
        "SELECT o.order_id, o.customer, SUM(oi.unit_price * oi.quantity) as total "
        "FROM Order o "
        "INNER JOIN OrderItem oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id "
        "GROUP BY o.order_id, o.customer;";

    conn.execute(create_view_sql);

    return conn.select_from<OrderSummary>();
}

}  // namespace create_view_order_summary
</answer>
output.result:
<answer>```cpp
#include <sqlgen.hpp>
#include <sqlgen/sqlite.hpp>
#include <vector>

namespace create_view_order_summary {

struct Order {
  sqlgen::PrimaryKey<int> order_id;
  std::string customer;
};

struct OrderItem {
  sqlgen::PrimaryKey<int> item_id;
  int order_id;
  double unit_price;
  int quantity;
};

struct OrderSummary {
  static constexpr const char* tablename = "OrderSummaryView";
  static constexpr bool is_view = true;
  sqlgen::PrimaryKey<int> order_id;
  std::string customer;
  double total;
};

std::vector<OrderSummary> create_view_order_summary() {
    auto conn = sqlgen::sqlite::connect("test_db.sqlite");

    const std::string create_view_sql =
        "CREATE VIEW OrderSummaryView AS "
        "SELECT o.order_id, o.customer, SUM(oi.unit_price * oi.quantity) as total "
        "FROM Order o "
        "INNER JOIN OrderItem oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id "
        "GROUP BY o.order_id, o.customer;";

    conn.execute(create_view_sql);

    return conn.select_from<OrderSummary>();
}

}  // namespace create_view_order_summary
</answer>

<answer>```cpp
#include <sqlgen.hpp>
#include <sqlgen/sqlite.hpp>
#include <vector>

namespace weekday_sales_analysis {

struct Sales {
  sqlgen::PrimaryKey<int> sale_id;
  int product_id;
  int quantity;
  sqlgen::Timestamp<"%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S"> sale_time;
};

struct WeekdayStats {
  int weekday;
  int total_quantity;
};

std::vector<WeekdayStats> weekday_sales_analysis() {
  auto session = sqlgen::sqlite::connect("test_db.sqlite");
  
  const auto query = session.select_from<Sales>(
      Sales::sale_time.strftime("%w").as("weekday"),
      sqlgen::sum(Sales::quantity).as("total_quantity")
    )
    .group_by("weekday");

  std::vector<WeekdayStats> stats;
  for (const auto& row : query) {
    WeekdayStats stat;
    stat.weekday = row.get<int>("weekday");
    stat.total_quantity = row.get<int>("total_quantity");
    stats.emplace_back(std::move(stat));
  }
  return stats;
}
}  // namespace weekday_sales_analysis
```</answer>

The function group_by_with_aggregations would:

1. Create a connection to the SQLite database.
2. Build the query with left join, group by, aggregations.

We need to create a session. Using sqlgen::sqlite::Connection, then make a session.

Then, build the query.

#include <sqlgen.hpp>
#include <sqlgen/sqlite.hpp>
#include <vector>
#include <optional>

namespace group_by_with_aggregations {

// ... structs ...

std::vector<Stats> group_by_with_aggregations() {
  using namespace sqlgen::ranges::views;

  auto conn = sqlgen::sqlite::Connection::make("test_db.sqlite");
  auto session = sqlgen::make_session(conn);

  const auto query = session->select_from<User>()
      .left_join<Post, User::user_id == Post::user_id>()
      .group_by<User::user_id, User::name>()
      .agg(sqlgen::count<Post::post_id>().as("post_count"),
             sqlgen::avg(sqlgen::length(Post::content)).as("avg_length"))
      .transform([](auto range) -> std::vector<Stats> {
        std::vector<Stats> stats;
        for (auto& res : range) {
          Stats s;
          s.user_id = res.get<User>().user_id;
          s.name = res.get<User>().name;
          s.post_count = res.get<int>("post_count");
          s.avg_length = res.get<std::optional<double>>("avg_length");
          stats.push_back(std::move(s));
        }
        return stats;
      });

  return query.value();
}

}  // namespace group_by_with_aggregations

#endif
